title: Multichain - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Large bridge withdrawal with compromised validator signatures

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers large amounts of funds from bridge contracts

monitoring_rules: Monitor for abnormal fund transfers from known bridge contracts
summary: Multichain's bridges were drained of $126M, representing around 50% of the FTM bridge and 80% of the Moonriver bridge holdings. A back-end breach, private key theft, or malicious insider actions are suspected as the attack vectors.
